_instructions: Grade each car 0-100 (the scale the product shows) BEFORE seeing the model's score.
Photos live in data/raw/condition_bench/<id>/ (gitignored). 3-8 photos per car,
phone-quality, walk-around style — the distribution real users produce.
human_grade anchors: 95+ showroom-clean · 80s minor cosmetic · 60s notable damage
At least 10 cars before quoting the agreement as a result.

cases.notes: one door ding, otherwise clean — replace with a real car and delete this
